title: Effectionate
description:
A PvP mod which changes how you play PvP,
made by AdamLts & jacobxny
body:
Thank you to Tahowe1 For play testing

check me out  my youtube [My youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@adamLts)
Are you looking to freshen up your pvp experience? Are you looking for something brand new, something different than your generic bliss or lifesteal mods.

Well look no further with Effectionate, your pvp skills matter most, in this intresting mod, whenever you die to another player, your "effect" goes down, and when you kill another player your "effect" goes up. The higher your "effect" the more powerful you are.

With Effectionate, gone are the days of boring pvp, and now you can have a fresh experience with many fun features.

This mod might have many issues, since we are a small group of unexperienced developers, please be kind and respectful if you find any problems or bugs.

# Features: 
- Anti-cheat: Prevents player or admins abusing their powers on servers
- Effects: Effects determine how strong you are on a server, the more you die the weaker you are.
- Craftable potions to level up your effects.
- Natural generating loot to help level up effects.

AdamLTs I made the Original code and up to the second to last one jacobxny helped fix textures and bugs.
Also Tahowe1 Did play testing

# Dependencies:

- Fabric API

**Also check out some mods made by jacobxny:**

- Note This!: https://modrinth.com/mod/note-this
- Item Blocker: https://modrinth.com/mod/item-blocker
